channel.title: academic on Combine Art and Sciences
channel.description: Recent content in academic on Combine Art and Sciences

item.title: How to find the innovative ideas for a new paper
item.description: Let me share some thoughts bout creating academic research paper. How to find the innovative ideas for a new paper A new idea is believed by the newbee PhD student a precious seed for his/her paper. And the papers are believed as their lifesaver for their tough days. Solution: a. adjust the mindset. A book named as ‘phD grind’ written by Philip Guo may helps. b. In your research area, hack up a classical work, a hot research work, a gorgeous work or a work you just want to hack up.
